Title: Kaleidoscope
Actors: Giancarlo Esposito, Rufus Sewell, Paz Vega
Plot: Spanning 24 years, Jigsaw centers around the largest heist ever attempted, and the vengeance, scheming, loyalties, and betrayals that surround it. It's loosely inspired by the real-life story where seventy billion dollars in bonds went missing in downtown Manhattan during Hurricane Sandy.
